articles.title: Connecticut woman running 2026 Boston Marathon after Alzheimer’s strikes her family again
articles.description:
"My dad — a lifelong Boston sports fan and three-time marathon runner — will cheer me on while his memory still allows him."

The post Connecticut woman running 2026 Boston Marathon after Alzheimer’s strikes her family again appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Connecticut woman Colleen Graham will run the 2026 Boston Marathon to honor her family.
Her father, a three-time marathon runner, supports her despite battling Alzheimer's.
The event raises awareness for Alzheimer's, impacting Boston families facing similar challenges.
